summary: Iteration 85: Bug Fix Verification - Preventivo Editor Page Loading Loop. All 8 tests PASSED (100%). The critical P0 bug where typing in input fields caused page reload/loop and data loss has been FIXED. Verified: 1) ingegnere_disegno field works correctly, 2) giorni_consegna field works correctly, 3) numero_disegno field works correctly, 4) Classe di Esecuzione dropdown works, 5) sessionStorage auto-save working, 6) Save button works, 7) Rapid sequential field filling works, 8) Tab switching preserves values.
critical_code_review_comments: ErrorBoundary moved below AuthProvider in App.js - prevents auth state reset on DOM errors
ProtectedRoute.js now uses sessionStorage 'nf_was_authenticated' flag to survive remounts
PreventivoEditorPage.js has sessionStorage auto-save with STORAGE_KEY pattern 'preventivo_draft_{prevId}'
Auto-save uses 300ms debounce (line 103-108) to avoid excessive writes
Draft is cleared on successful save via clearDraft() callback
All input fields have proper data-testid attributes for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: The P0 bug on Preventivo Editor page is FIXED. Key fix involved: 1) Moving ErrorBoundary below AuthProvider to prevent auth state reset on DOM errors from browser extensions, 2) Adding sessionStorage 'nf_was_authenticated' flag in ProtectedRoute to survive component remounts, 3) Adding sessionStorage auto-save for form drafts in PreventivoEditorPage. All critical input fields (ingegnere_disegno, giorni_consegna, numero_disegno) and the Classe di Esecuzione dropdown work correctly without page reload.

bugs_verified_fixed.description: Page entering loading loop/reload when typing in input fields (ingegnere_disegno, giorni_consegna), causing all unsaved form data to be lost
bugs_verified_fixed.root_cause: ErrorBoundary wrapped entire app including BrowserRouter and AuthProvider. DOM errors from browser extensions caused ErrorBoundary recovery which remounted AuthProvider, resetting loading=true and user=null, causing ProtectedRoute to show spinner
bugs_verified_fixed.fix_applied: 1) ErrorBoundary moved below AuthProvider, 2) sessionStorage auth flag for ProtectedRoute, 3) sessionStorage form draft auto-save
